title: Facebook Profile Posts & All Photos Scraper
description: Collect latest or historical posts exposed on public Facebook personal profiles without supplying Facebook cookies or login credentials. Each dataset result is one post with direct or nested text, Facebook publication time, stable identifiers, author data, engagement when available, and all recoverable photo URLs, including hidden +N albums. Supports agent-ready API/MCP output, newest-post monitoring, per-profile isolation, and resumable historical backfills. Private, friends-only, Pages, Groups, Marketplace, and login-only content are not accessed.

profileUrls.title: Public Facebook profile URLs
profileUrls.description: Required. Public Facebook personal-profile URLs, vanity handles, numeric IDs, profile.php?id=... URLs, or /people/.../<id> URLs. Do not enter Pages, Groups, Marketplace listings, or direct post URLs.

maxProfilesPerRun.title: Max profiles per run
maxProfilesPerRun.description: Maximum number of profile targets processed independently in one run. Extra profileUrls are skipped and reported in SUMMARY.

maxPostsPerProfile.title: Max posts per profile
maxPostsPerProfile.description: Maximum public post results returned for each profile. Use a small number for first tests or daily monitoring. For deeper history, request up to 1,000 posts, then continue with SUMMARY.profiles[].pointer.nextCursor.

expandAllPhotos.title: Expand all photos
expandAllPhotos.description: Recover public photo URLs hidden behind Facebook +N album grids. Keep enabled for photo-complete datasets; disable only for a faster preview-only run.

omitPinnedPosts.title: Omit pinned posts
omitPinnedPosts.description: Exclude pinned older posts from the profile header feed so latest-post and scheduled monitoring runs stay predictable.

sinceDate.title: Since date
sinceDate.description: Optional monitoring boundary. Starting from the profile head, stop after reaching posts older than this date. Use an ISO date or timestamp.

knownPostIds.title: Known post IDs
knownPostIds.description: Post IDs already stored by your pipeline. The Actor starts from the newest visible posts and stops before the first matching ID. Best for scheduled monitoring without old duplicates.

startCursor.title: Start cursor
startCursor.description: Cursor from SUMMARY.pointer.nextCursor for a one-profile older-post backfill. Do not use yesterday's cursor to look for newer posts or reuse one profile's cursor for another profile.

includeRawPayload.title: Include raw payload
includeRawPayload.description: Include the parsed Facebook post payload in each result. Enable only for debugging or schema research because output becomes much larger.

includeUnavailablePosts.title: Include unavailable timeline cards
includeUnavailablePosts.description: Return timeline cards whose shared or attached Facebook content has been deleted or access-restricted. Disabled by default so empty unavailable cards do not count toward the requested post total.

bootstrapRetries.title: Bootstrap retries
bootstrapRetries.description: Fresh proxy/session attempts for profile resolution and bootstrap failures.

graphqlPageRetries.title: GraphQL page retries
graphqlPageRetries.description: Retries for transient empty, rate-limited, or failed timeline pages.

proxyCountry.title: Proxy country
proxyCountry.description: Two-letter country code for Apify residential proxy sessions.

fallbackProxyCountries.title: Rate-limit fallback countries
fallbackProxyCountries.description: Up to three residential proxy countries tried only when Facebook temporarily rate-limits or rejects a profile in the primary country.

mediaExpansionConcurrency.title: Photo expansion concurrency
mediaExpansionConcurrency.description: Number of posts whose public photo sets can be expanded in parallel.

mediaSetRetries.title: Photo-set retries
mediaSetRetries.description: Retry count for each Facebook media/set or permalink expansion request.

debug.title: Debug output
debug.description: Add discovery and response diagnostics to SUMMARY.
